prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.9 kg; Height 161.6 cm; BMI 25.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 147mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.1kg; 9 months ago 66.7kg; 6 months ago 64.8kg; 3 months ago 65.7kg; current 66.9kg), Height (12 months ago 161.6cm; 9 months ago 161.6cm; 6 months ago 161.6cm; 3 months ago 161.6cm; current 161.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 21U/L), AST (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 211mg/g; 9 months ago 183mg/g; 6 months ago 249mg/g; 3 months ago 286mg/g; current 135mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 73mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 71mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 185mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 184mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
